reviews.comment:
Buena atención,  pero no deberían quedarse sin combustible

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but they shouldn't run out of fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3778560078587040720/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3bWF1YjFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
No posee grupo electrógeno, lo que es un inconveniente cuando no hay suministro de energía en la zona

(Translated by Google)
It does not have a generator, which is a disadvantage when there is no power supply in the area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3778560078587040720/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3bDZ5RkhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Despachan combustible YPF, tiene servishop, baños, dispone de habitaciones para descansar. Es una estación de servicios completa.

(Translated by Google)
They sell YPF fuel, have a convenience store, restrooms, and rooms for resting. It's a full-service station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3778560078587040720/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRcmF6bF9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
se puede inflar aunque No tiene manómetro. La atención es buena, el servicentro poco provisto.

(Translated by Google)
It can be inflated even though it doesn't have a pressure gauge. The service is good, but the service station is poorly stocked.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3778560078587040720/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBN3FDMmh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Maravillosa la gente, dispuestos a brindar una mano siempre

(Translated by Google)
The people are wonderful, always willing to lend a hand
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3778560078587040720/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRME5IZHpRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Chicos buena onda. Wifi, agua caliente, lo necesario para un viajero xd

(Translated by Google)
Cool guys. Wi-Fi, hot water, everything a traveler needs lol

reviews.comment:
Suelo hospedarme ahi y es de lo mejorcito que hay en Juarez.

(Translated by Google)
I usually stay there and it's one of the best places in Juarez.

reviews.comment:
Siempre a mano en la ruta,paso obligado para el descanso...

(Translated by Google)
Always handy on the route, a must-stop for a rest...
